title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a simple CLI and Docker-style API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for the Ollama API; installable via PyPI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; published on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with multi-model chats, file uploads, RAG, user auth.

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: Lightweight CLI copilot that wraps Ollama for inline code questions and completions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama + Chroma for local docs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that streams Ollama model replies in chat channels.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; Maven Central artifact with synchronous & async APIs.

title: ollama-copilots-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that hooks Ollama models into inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-express
summary: Starter repo showing how to build an Express proxy that adds auth & rate-limiting in front of Ollama.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux/macOS with CUDA & ROCm variants.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama with streaming chat completions and embeddings.

title: ollama-model-importer
summary: CLI utility to bulk-convert HuggingFace models into Ollama Modelfile format and push to local registry.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and note Q&A via local models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack slash-command bot backed by Ollama with thread support and per-channel model selection.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration node to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot with group & private chat support, session memory, and per-user model choice.
